subcodes.first_line: O ‘Alí before Akbar! Mention of thee hath been and continues to be made before the Most Great Horizon. Verily, thou hast been honored with a Tablet that shineth over the horizon
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر ذکرت در منظر اکبر بوده و هست قد فزت بلوح لاح من افقه نیر
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @dissimulation [taqiyyih]; concealment or denial of Faith, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
